current.lean_note: ADVERSARIAL VETO: The forecaster assumes near-certainty based on a single prior statement and a technicality, ignoring market consensus and the unpredictability of political speech. The extreme confidence (0.99) is unjustified by the thin, one-sided evidence
adversarial_concerns: Divergence of 0.845 from market implies crowd knowledge forecaster is missing
Assumes past speech guarantees future mention without accounting for political context shifts
Base-rate neglect: Trump's uranium mentions are rare and context-dependent
current.rationale_summary: Uranium enrichment is the core issue of the US-Iran deal signed Jun 19 (inside the window); Trump making frequent public remarks and ALREADY said it Jun 18 at the G7 ('Iran should have the right to enrich uranium'). Near-certain; only residual is resolution-source technicality.
key_drivers: core issue of deal signed Jun19 in-window
reference_classes: principal says operative noun of lead story over multi-day window (near-certain)
